arts.ttl: Erling Haaland gets final Premier League ban verdict after Man City vs Arsenal incidents
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was at the centre of several controversial incidents during Manchester City's Premier League clash with Arsenal on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Why Leandro Trossard Wont Miss Premier League Game Despite Man City Red Card
arts.sum: Arsenal will be able to select Leandro Trossard for their Premier League clash against Leicester City on September 28.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Watford - TV channel, kick-off time, live stream details
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news and gossip as Pep Guardiola's side prepare to face Watford in the third round of the Carabao Cup at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: What’s Man City’s record with and without Rodri? Premier League, Champions League
arts.sum: Rodri was forced to leave the game against Arsenal after sustaining an injury that immediately raised concerns at Manchester City. Out of the 260 matches he’s played for the Manchester club, Guardiola’s side has won 74% of their games, drawn 15%, and lost just 11%.

arts.ttl: Gabriel fires warning to Man City and Erling Haaland following controversial celebration
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Gabriel was unaware that Erling Haaland threw the ball at him during Sunday's 2-2 draw with Manchester City, but warned he and his teammates will be 'waiting for them' in the return fixture. Speaking to TNT Sports Brasil, post-match, Gabriel responded to Haaland's actions before issuing a warning to City .

arts.ttl: Unrepentant Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta refuses to accept blame for red cards - and says he would've been 'very thick' not to go ultra-defensive at Man City
arts.sum: Trossard's dismissal came just weeks after Declan Rice was given his marching orders against Brighton, with the midfielder also shown a second yellow card for kicking the ball away.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon insists Gunners' 'dark arts' should be CELEBRATED after Man City draw
arts.sum: Arsenal have come in for criticism for the way they set about defending their lead against Manchester City but not everyone is opposed the the approach from Mikel Arteta's team

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta responds to accusations Arsenal used ‘dark arts’ against Manchester City
arts.sum: The Arsenal manager says his team learnt from past encounters with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Report: What Leandro Trossard told his Arsenal teammates in the dressing room after being sent off vs Man City
arts.sum: Refereeing decisions were once again at the centre of the conversation this weekend as Arsenal played Manchester City. The Gunners came away from the Etihad...
